title: Deploy application to production

requirements.text: Configure the application for production deployment with appropriate canister settings and environment variables
acceptanceCriteria: Application is configured for production environment
All canister settings are optimized for live deployment

requirements.text: Ensure all frontend assets are optimized and minified for production deployment
acceptanceCriteria: JavaScript bundles are minified and optimized
CSS is minified and purged of unused styles
Images and static assets are compressed
Source maps are generated for debugging

requirements.text: Verify all Internet Identity authentication flows work correctly in production environment
acceptanceCriteria: Login functionality works with production Internet Identity service
Authentication state persists across page refreshes
No authentication errors in production console

requirements.text: Ensure all external links and resources use production-ready URLs and configurations
acceptanceCriteria: All API endpoints point to production backend
Social media links are correct and functional
No development/localhost references remain in code

constraints: Must maintain all existing functionality during deployment
Cannot change the Internet Identity integration implementation
Must preserve all UI components and styling in frontend/src/components
Backend remains a minimal actor as video processing is not supported on this platform
nonGoals: Implementing actual video processing or AI conversion functionality
Adding external API integrations for video processing
Changing the visual design or theme
